## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Andrew Bishara for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew Bishara, a Content Manager, solves QA gaps by building and training teams on structured, multi-review workflows, preventing issues like mismatched landing page content.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [He scales output by using a custom ChatGPT to generate blog drafts from video transcripts, ensuring a natural brand voice and covering the content pipeline through mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [The Managing Editor role is evolving to be end-to-end (workflow + editing) to streamline the process by removing the Content Manager step.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Bishara disclosed a Feb 19–Mar 15 trip to Australia, which will make the 9 AM–1 PM PT availability window difficult; the trip can be taken as unpaid vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inconsistent Quality & QA Gaps

  - [**Context:** Bishara's current role involves managing competing deadlines for SEO, social media, and daily video publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Challenge:** A landing page was created with content that mismatched its promotional email.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**Impact:** This inconsistency risked confusing customers and damaging brand trust.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** QA was an afterthought, occurring too late in the process.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Video content was published with grammatical errors and internal titles.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Impact:** This damaged the brand's professional image.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** No formal QA process existed for video content.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)

### Solution: Structured Workflows & AI Scaling

  - [**Solution 1: Email/Landing Page QA Process**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [**Process:** Content Writer → Bishara (initial review) → Marketing Manager → Bishara (final review of agency test email) → Agency schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Eliminated quality errors.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [**Refinement:** After training the content team to self-manage the process, Bishara streamlined it by removing his review step to prevent QA bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Solution 2: Video QA Process**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Action:** Bishara and the Marketing Manager built a new workflow to ensure all video content is reviewed before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The new process is now "smooth" and has eliminated quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**Solution 3: AI-Powered Blog Scaling**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase blog output from 1 to 2 posts/week without increasing writer workload.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [**Method:** A custom ChatGPT generates drafts from video transcripts, which are fed in to ensure a natural, on-brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Process:** Bishara provides topics/keywords → Writers use AI to draft → Bishara performs final QA.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The content pipeline is now covered through mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### The Managing Editor Role at GrowthX

  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [Implement client strategy set by the Director.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [Manage 1–5 client accounts with varying content needs (e.g., 5–26 pieces/week).](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [**Evolving Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Current:** Content Manager runs workflows → Managing Editor edits in Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Future:** The role will be end-to-end (workflow + editing) to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [Deliver high-quality content with minimal client feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [Drive measurable client outcomes to secure renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [**Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**SEO:** SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Analytics:** Looker (until a proprietary tool launches in \~1 month)](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** JIRA, Notion](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

### Logistics & Availability

  - [**Required Availability:** 9 AM–1 PM PT for client calls and team syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Bishara's Travel:**](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Dates:** Feb 19–Mar 15, 2025 (Australia).](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Impact:** The 9 AM–1 PM PT window will be difficult to maintain due to the time difference.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Bishara can take this period as unpaid vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [**Contractor Vacation Pay:** Bishara asked if contractors are paid for vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Megan Dickey will ask HR for clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marilia (GrowthX):** Follow up with Bishara regarding the take-home test.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Megan Dickey (GrowthX):** Ask HR for clarification on contractor vacation pay.](https://fathom.video/share/CKTdp6Qs8YaKLLXKr313yTAsbx5ZGy9m?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
